metadata.description: Opinionated Claude Code plugins for professional coding — language-specific authoring skills and expert subagents.

plugins.name: rust-dev
plugins.description: Idiomatic Rust authoring: progressive-disclosure skill plus rust-expert authoring subagent and slash commands for review and refactor.

plugins.name: android-dev
plugins.description: Android development plugin: Gradle build management, UI/UX design with Material 3 and Figma, multi-device emulator orchestration via bundled MCP stack, mock server generation, and automated screenshot capture across phone and tablet form factors.
